---
title: "Interest Rate Risk and Bond Pricing"
subtitle: "A Comprehensive Analysis of the Dothan Model"
author: 
  - name: "Financial Risk Management"
    affiliation: "Educational Project"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Welcome

This project provides a comprehensive analysis of interest rate risk and bond pricing using the Dothan stochastic interest rate model. 


## Key Topics

- **Introduction & Objectives** - Understanding interest rate risk
- **Theoretical Framework** - The Dothan Model and Bond Pricing theory
- **Implementation** - Interest rate simulations and bond price calculations
- **Risk Analysis** - Portfolio risk assessment and stress tests
